title: 15 Types of Mushrooms and How to Cook With Them
summary: Overview of culinary mushrooms with short notes on flavor, texture, and kitchen use.

title: Get Poison Help
summary: Free 24/7 poison help in the United States at 1-800-222-1222 and PoisonHelp.org.

title: Investigation of Illnesses: Morel Mushrooms (May 2023)
summary: FDA safety guidance on morels and other wild-type mushrooms, including poisoning risks, false morels, and the need for expert identification.

title: Natural Toxins in Food
summary: FDA overview of naturally occurring toxins in foods, including toxic mushrooms and plant toxins.

title: FDA Alerts Industry and Consumers about the Use of Amanita Muscaria or its Constituents in Food
summary: FDA warning that Amanita muscaria and certain constituents are not authorized food ingredients and may be harmful.

title: Poison Ivy
summary: Plain-language poison ivy identification, hazards, and control guidance, including the warning not to burn it.

title: Poison hemlock
summary: Identification and hazard reference for poison hemlock, including a warning that all plant parts are highly toxic.
